Bharat ka Samvidhan kab lagu (effective) hua?
Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi kaun si hai?
Saur mandal ka sabse bada grah kaun sa hai?
Bharat ke pratham Pradhan Mantri kaun the?
Bharat ka Rashtriya Phool kaun sa hai?

Bharat ke Rashtrapati ka karyakal kitna hota hai?
